title: Dr. Beckmann MAGIC LEAVES Laundry Detergent Sheets BIO | Convenient and pre-dosed laundry detergent sheets | Dissolvable climate neutral and easy to use | 25 sheets

features: Make washing easy with MAGIC LEAVES BIO, the ultra-lightweight and eco-friendly detergent sheets that fully dissolve in water. The NEW smart way to wash (also available in NON-BIO).
One water-soluble laundry sheet ensures a deep clean and revived colours for your wash with Fresh Blossom fragrance. The sheet dissolves even at low temperatures (from 20°C) and quick wash cycles.
Washing the sustainable way: the CLIMATE NEUTRAL laundry sheets are free from microplastic, free from preservatives. Completely vegan and dermatologically tested so kind to skin.

The eco-friendly and climate-neutral laundry detergent sheets are perfectly pre-dosed, 100% soluble in water while still being highly efficient. The convenient format means less space is required to store around the home.

MAGIC LEAVES are easy and convenient to use: the effortless way to wash, simply put the sheet into the drum with the laundry. Also suitable for hand washing. Help us to reduce CO2 emissions: Choose a compact and eco-friendly format
description: Product Description " DR. BECKMANN MAGIC LEAVES BIO LAUNDRY DETERGENT SHEETS - THE SMART WAY TO WASH YOUR LAUNDRY! Discover the feather-light laundry detergent sheets that make washing so convenient. One water-soluble sheet ensures a deep clean and revived colours with Fresh Blossom fragrance - even at low temperatures. Make washing easy: Just pop one sheet into the washing drum and experience a highly convenient way to wash your laundry – even on quick wash cycles. The ultra-lightweight and compact format is easy to carry, easy to store, minimises packaging waste and the carbon footprint. • Easy to transport, easy to store • Easy to use, no overdosing • Suitable for short wash cycles • Works from 20 – 60°C • Free from microplastic • Free from preservatives • Less packaging waste • Vegan Help us to reduce CO2 emissions: Choose a compact and eco-friendly format. CLIMATE NEUTRAL Product Directions for use Washing machine: 1. Put the sheet directly into the drum. 2. Fill drum with laundry (up to 4.5 kg). 3. Start a regular washing cycle. Hand Wash: 1. Use half a sheet and dissolve in warm orcold water. 2. Add laundry and wash by hand (up to 2.5 kg). 3. Thoroughly rinse with water. Important Information Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. Do nottouch with damp or wet hands. For best results, we recommendplacing the sheet in the empty drum first. Do not use in thedispenser or in a dryer. Always follow the garment care labels.Pre-treat stubborn stains with a stain remover, e.g. Dr. BeckmannStain Devils. Not suitable for wool or silk.Wash non-colourfast laundry separately. " Ingredients More than 30% Anionic Surfactants , Perfumes ,Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool , Enzymes Manufacturer Contact Information Delta Pronatura, Kurt-Schumacher-Ring 15-17, 63329 Egelsbach, Germany.
